name: secrets-scanner
description: Install, uninstall, add a pre-commit hook for, or run the secrets-scanner CLI that detects leaked secrets, API keys, and credentials.

interface.shortDescription: Install and run a local secrets scanner
interface.longDescription: Guides installation, removal, staged pre-commit hook setup, on-demand scans, and hardened proxy integration for the secrets-scanner CLI.
defaultPrompt: Add a fail-closed pre-commit secret scan.
Scan this repo for leaked secrets.
